metadata.title: Rovana Jewelry — Gold & Diamonds
metadata.description: Discover Rovana Jewelry in Damascus: gold, diamonds, and custom designs. Browse our collections or contact us for bespoke jewelry.

hero.title: Timeless Elegance
hero.subtitle: Syria's trusted jewelry destination crafting heirloom pieces in the heart of Damascus.
hero.subtitle1: Exquisite designs and custom jewelry with generational expertise.
hero.subtitle2: Family heritage in fine jewelry craftsmanship

welcome.title: Rovana Jewelry
welcome.description: Rovana Jewelry offers exclusive designs of gold, diamonds, rings, pendants and bracelets, with custom jewelry design service based in Damascus, Syria.
welcome.subtitle: Rovana Jewelry: gold, diamonds, rings, pendants, bracelets and custom jewelry design in Damascus.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.description: We take pride in creating exceptional jewelry that brings joy to our customers. Here's what some of our satisfied clients have to say about their experience with our collections and craftsmanship.

saif.name: Saif Kilani
saif.text: Praise be to God for the service, honesty, and truth in dealing. I have been dealing with them for over 4 years. May God bless them in their business.

tala.name: Tala Adas
tala.text: Honestly, one of the most comfortable and best gold stores I've dealt with. Dealing with them is very comfortable and dignified, they always listen to the details I request and make the piece exactly as I want. They are also very committed to delivery times and never delay. Besides that, their style is service-oriented and kind, and I truly feel confident when dealing with them. I highly recommend them 👍😍

anas.name: Anas Yacoub
anas.text: One of the best jewelry galleries in Damascus, dignified and kind dealing, with a distinguished collection of gold and jewelry. I recommend everyone to try them.

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.description: Subscribe to our newsletter for exclusive offers and new arrivals

collection.subtitle: A curated selection of rings, necklaces, bracelets and statement pieces — each a quiet promise of craftsmanship.
collection.empty: New pieces in this collection are arriving soon.

services.subtitle: From custom designs to expert repairs, we offer comprehensive jewelry services tailored to your needs.

custom.title: Custom Design
custom.description: Bring your vision to life with our bespoke jewelry design service.

repair.title: Expert Repair
repair.description: Professional restoration and maintenance for your precious pieces.

appraisal.title: Valuation
appraisal.description: Accurate appraisals for insurance, estate, or resale purposes.

consultation.title: Styling Consultation
consultation.description: Expert guidance on selecting the perfect piece for any occasion.

heritage.subtitle: Our commitment to craftsmanship and trust has remained unwavering through the years.
heritage.founderCaption: Our founder outside the original shop
heritage.chapter1Text1: Our story began with a commitment to exceptional craftsmanship and honest business practices.
heritage.chapter1Text2: The foundation was built on trust, quality, and a deep respect for the art of jewelry making - values that continue to guide us today.
heritage.chapter2Text: In the 1970s, we expanded our operations to Damascus, Syria, bringing our expertise and reputation for quality to the growing capital city.
heritage.marketCaption: The historic Goldsmith's Market in old Damascus

1921.title: The Beginning
1921.text: Founded in Jaffa, establishing our reputation for exceptional craftsmanship.

1970s.title: New Era
1970s.text: Expanded to Damascus, bringing our expertise to Syria's growing capital.

2000s.title: Modern Legacy
2000s.text: Established our flagship boutique in Sweifieh, becoming a landmark destination.

today.title: Continuing Tradition
today.text: Serving a new generation while honoring the timeless values of our founders.

whyChooseUs.subtitle: Discover what makes Rovana Jewelry the preferred choice for discerning clients.

heritage.title: Century of Heritage
heritage.description: Over 100 years of trusted expertise in fine jewelry craftsmanship.

craftsmanship.title: Master Craftsmen
craftsmanship.description: Our skilled artisans bring decades of experience to every piece.

quality.title: Uncompromising Quality
quality.description: Only the finest materials and strict quality standards for all our pieces.

service.title: Personal Service
service.description: Individualized attention and guidance throughout your jewelry journey.

cta.body: Visit our boutique in Damascus or contact us to begin your journey with Rovana Jewelry.

footer.description: Crafting exquisite custom jewelry since 1948. Your vision, our expertise.

contact.title: Contact Us
